initial_candidates.sql:
WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        ct.customer_id,
        strftime('%Y-%m', ct.txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN ct.txn_type = 'purchase' THEN ct.txn_amount
                WHEN ct.txn_type = 'refund' THEN -ct.txn_amount
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS monthly_change
    FROM customer_transactions ct
    GROUP BY ct.customer_id, strftime('%Y-%m', ct.txn_date)
),
all_customers_months AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        ct.customer_id,
        m.month
    FROM customer_transactions ct
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date) AS month 
        FROM customer_transactions
    ) m
),
customer_monthly_with_zeros AS (
    SELECT 
        acm.customer_id,
        acm.month,
        COALESCE(mb.monthly_change, 0) AS monthly_change
    FROM all_customers_months acm
    LEFT JOIN monthly_balances mb 
        ON acm.customer_id = mb.customer_id AND acm.month = mb.month
),
cumulative_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        month,
        monthly_change,
        SUM(monthly_change) OVER (
            PARTITION BY customer_id 
            ORDER BY month 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS cumulative_balance
    FROM customer_monthly_with_zeros
)
SELECT 
    customer_id,
    month,
    monthly_change,
    cumulative_balance
FROM cumulative_balances
ORDER BY customer_id ASC, month ASC;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        ct.customer_id,
        strftime('%Y-%m', ct.txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN ct.txn_type = 'purchase' THEN ct.txn_amount
                WHEN ct.txn_type = 'refund' THEN -ct.txn_amount
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS monthly_net_change
    FROM customer_transactions ct
    JOIN customer_nodes cn ON ct.customer_id = cn.customer_id
    JOIN customer_regions cr ON cn.region_id = cr.region_id
    GROUP BY ct.customer_id, strftime('%Y-%m', ct.txn_date)
),
all_months AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date) AS month
    FROM customer_transactions
),
all_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT customer_id
    FROM customer_transactions
),
customer_months AS (
    SELECT 
        ac.customer_id,
        am.month
    FROM all_customers ac
    CROSS JOIN all_months am
),
monthly_with_zeros AS (
    SELECT 
        cm.customer_id,
        cm.month,
        COALESCE(mb.monthly_net_change, 0) AS monthly_net_change
    FROM customer_months cm
    LEFT JOIN monthly_balances mb 
        ON cm.customer_id = mb.customer_id 
        AND cm.month = mb.month
),
cumulative_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        month,
        monthly_net_change,
        SUM(monthly_net_change) OVER (
            PARTITION BY customer_id 
            ORDER BY month 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS cumulative_balance
    FROM monthly_with_zeros
)
SELECT 
    customer_id,
    month,
    monthly_net_change,
    cumulative_balance
FROM cumulative_balances
ORDER BY customer_id ASC, month ASC;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        ct.customer_id,
        strftime('%Y-%m', ct.txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN ct.txn_type = 'purchase' THEN ct.txn_amount
                WHEN ct.txn_type = 'refund' THEN -ct.txn_amount
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS monthly_net_change
    FROM customer_transactions ct
    GROUP BY ct.customer_id, strftime('%Y-%m', ct.txn_date)
),
all_months AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date) AS month
    FROM customer_transactions
),
all_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT customer_id
    FROM customer_transactions
),
customer_month_combinations AS (
    SELECT c.customer_id, m.month
    FROM all_customers c
    CROSS JOIN all_months m
),
balanced_months AS (
    SELECT 
        cm.customer_id,
        cm.month,
        COALESCE(mb.monthly_net_change, 0) AS monthly_net_change
    FROM customer_month_combinations cm
    LEFT JOIN monthly_balances mb 
        ON cm.customer_id = mb.customer_id 
        AND cm.month = mb.month
),
cumulative_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        month,
        monthly_net_change,
        SUM(monthly_net_change) OVER (
            PARTITION BY customer_id 
            ORDER BY month 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS cumulative_balance
    FROM balanced_months
)
SELECT 
    customer_id,
    month,
    monthly_net_change AS monthly_change,
    cumulative_balance AS closing_balance
FROM cumulative_balances
ORDER BY customer_id ASC, month ASC;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        ct.customer_id,
        strftime('%Y-%m', ct.txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN ct.txn_type = 'purchase' THEN -ct.txn_amount
                WHEN ct.txn_type = 'refund' THEN ct.txn_amount
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS monthly_net_change
    FROM customer_transactions ct
    GROUP BY ct.customer_id, strftime('%Y-%m', ct.txn_date)
),
all_months AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date) AS month
    FROM customer_transactions
),
customer_months AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ct.customer_id, am.month
    FROM customer_transactions ct
    CROSS JOIN all_months am
),
customer_monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        cm.customer_id,
        cm.month,
        COALESCE(mb.monthly_net_change, 0) AS monthly_change
    FROM customer_months cm
    LEFT JOIN monthly_balances mb 
        ON cm.customer_id = mb.customer_id AND cm.month = mb.month
),
cumulative_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        month,
        monthly_change,
        SUM(monthly_change) OVER (
            PARTITION BY customer_id 
            ORDER BY month 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS cumulative_balance
    FROM customer_monthly_balances
)
SELECT 
    customer_id,
    month,
    monthly_change,
    cumulative_balance
FROM cumulative_balances
ORDER BY customer_id ASC, month ASC;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        ct.customer_id,
        strftime('%Y-%m', ct.txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN ct.txn_type = 'purchase' THEN -ct.txn_amount
                WHEN ct.txn_type = 'refund' THEN ct.txn_amount
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS monthly_change,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN ct.txn_type = 'purchase' THEN -ct.txn_amount
                WHEN ct.txn_type = 'refund' THEN ct.txn_amount
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) OVER (
            PARTITION BY ct.customer_id 
            ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', ct.txn_date)
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS cumulative_balance
    FROM customer_transactions ct
    JOIN customer_nodes cn ON ct.customer_id = cn.customer_id
    JOIN customer_regions cr ON cn.region_id = cr.region_id
    GROUP BY ct.customer_id, strftime('%Y-%m', ct.txn_date)
),
all_months AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT strftime('%Y-%m', txn_date) AS month
    FROM customer_transactions
),
customer_list AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT customer_id
    FROM customer_transactions
),
customer_months AS (
    SELECT 
        c.customer_id,
        m.month
    FROM customer_list c
    CROSS JOIN all_months m
),
filled_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        cm.customer_id,
        cm.month,
        COALESCE(mb.monthly_change, 0) AS monthly_change,
        COALESCE(mb.cumulative_balance, 
            (SELECT SUM(
                CASE 
                    WHEN ct.txn_type = 'purchase' THEN -ct.txn_amount
                    WHEN ct.txn_type = 'refund' THEN ct.txn_amount
                    ELSE 0
                END
            )
            FROM customer_transactions ct
            WHERE ct.customer_id = cm.customer_id
              AND strftime('%Y-%m', ct.txn_date) <= cm.month
            )
        ) AS cumulative_balance
    FROM customer_months cm
    LEFT JOIN monthly_balances mb 
        ON cm.customer_id = mb.customer_id AND cm.month = mb.month
)
SELECT 
    customer_id,
    month,
    monthly_change,
    cumulative_balance
FROM filled_balances
ORDER BY customer_id ASC, month ASC;
